string-array.name: answer_arr
string-array.item: Xunyou Game Turbo built in Game Space/XArena na product wey dey specifically designed for TECNO/Infinix to improve di game network stability. E fit solve di problems dem of high latency, disconnection, etc. and make di network smoother and di game more stable. E dey support Wi-Fi and oda data networks dem(5G/4G/3G).
Di game turbo dey already support most games dem. If some games dem no fit dey boosted, you fit contact online customer service for support.
TECNO/Infinix ID na di account of di player wey dey use di Xunyou Game Turbo services in di Game Space/XArena. Each account fit get relevant free benefits dem and boost di services dem after login.
1. Refresh to check di payment network. 2. Check whether di balance of di payment account dey sufficient to support di payment.
Abeg press di link below to read di %1$s and %2$s.

string-array.name: question_arr
string-array.item: What is di function of di game turbo?
Which games dem di game turbo dey support?
Which account dey bound to di game turbo?
How you fit solve payment problems dem?
Where you fit read di Privacy Policy and User Agreement?
